title: Your Ways Are Known

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Let Your grace fall like morning dew
Let Your face shine on me and you
All nations rise to sing Your praise
As mercy guides us through our days

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let all people sing for joy
Let Your justice reign
Every heart and every voice
Will bless Your holy name
(Let all people sing for joy)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From earth's corners the harvest grows
Your wisdom like a river flows
The nations dance in freedom's light
As dawn dispels the darkest night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let all people sing for joy
Let Your justice reign
Every heart and every voice
Will bless Your holy name
(Let all people sing for joy)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Your ways are known in every land
From shore to shore, from sand to sand
The earth brings forth its bounty sweet
As all creation bows at Your feet

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let all people sing for joy
Let Your justice reign
Every heart and every voice
Will bless Your holy name
Let all people sing for joy
Let Your justice reign
Till every voice on earth proclaims
Your everlasting name
(Till every voice on earth proclaims
Your everlasting name)

epigraph: That thy way may be known upon earth
